THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FISCHER CHRISTINA M C/O CONNIE DIFAZIO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARNES LESLIE $213.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $253.00, DEFT TO KEEP FUTON (FRAME, MATTRESS:COVER) BOX SPRING; MATTRESS SET, FORMICA END TABLE.
